import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import './CategoryPage.css'; const BANNERS = [ { src: './img/new/banner.jpg', alt: 'Banner 1' }, { src: './img/new/banner-01.jpg', alt: 'Banner 2' }, ]; const LISTINGS = [ { id: 1, name: 'Gv Solutions', rating: '5.0', ratingCount: '6 Ratings', topTag: 'Top Search', location: 'Madurai', years: '12 Years in Business', tags: ['Software Companies', 'Online Websites'], phone: '08460506156', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1498050108023-c5249f4df085?auto=format&fit=crop&w=400', }, { id: 2, name: 'TechNest Systems', rating: '4.8', ratingCount: '14 Ratings', topTag: 'JD Verified', location: 'Anna Nagar, Madurai', years: '8 Years in Business', tags: ['Mobile Apps', 'Web Design'], phone: '09876543210', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1547658719-da2b51169166?auto=format&fit=crop&w=400', }, { id: 3, name: 'PixelForge Studio', rating: '4.5', ratingCount: '9 Ratings', topTag: null, location: 'KK Nagar, Madurai', years: '5 Years in Business', tags: ['UI/UX Design', 'Branding'], phone: '07890123456', img: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1461749280684-dccba630e2f6?auto=format&fit=crop&w=400', }, ]; function CategoryBanner() { const [current, setCurrent] = useState(0); useEffect(() => { const t = setInterval(() => setCurrent((c) => (c + 1) % BANNERS.length), 5000); return () => clearInterval(t); }, []); return (
